description: Author, validate, debug, and explain OPA Rego policies through any MCP-compatible client.
name: io.github.OrygnsCode/opa-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of a running OPA server. Required only for opa_* runtime tools, not for rego_* language tools.
environmentVariables.name: OPA_URL

environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for OPA running with --authentication=token.
environmentVariables.name: OPA_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Path to the opa binary. Defaults to 'opa' on PATH.
environmentVariables.name: OPA_BINARY

environmentVariables.description: Path to the regal binary (optional, used by rego_lint). Defaults to 'regal' on PATH.
environmentVariables.name: REGAL_BINARY

environmentVariables.description: Path to the conftest binary (optional, used by conftest_* tools). Defaults to 'conftest' on PATH.
environmentVariables.name: CONFTEST_BINARY

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of root directories tools may read/write. When unset, file-based tools refuse to access the disk.
environmentVariables.name: OPA_MCP_ALLOWED_PATHS

environmentVariables.description: GitHub personal access token with the "gist" scope. Required only for rego_playground_share.
environmentVariables.name: GITHUB_TOKEN

title: OPA MCP
